Document:
# Followers of the Apocalypse
[textlink="View Full Wiki Page" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/Followers_of_the_Apocalypse"]
Founded in the ruins of the Los Angeles Public Library. The Followers believe knowledge, medicine, and education are more powerful than weapons. Non-violent, non-aligned. Will help anyone.
## Philosophy
The Great War was caused by humanity's unwillingness to share knowledge and resources. The Followers' response is radical openness — free clinics, free education, freely shared pre-war records. This puts them in direct conflict with the Brotherhood of Steel, who lock away technology.
The Followers maintain the largest accessible archive of pre-war knowledge in the Wasteland. They run free clinics and teach the illiterate. Their neutrality is both their strength and their vulnerability.
## Roles
[bold][color=#6bba5e]Followers Doctor[/color][/bold] Provide medical care to anyone. Your neutrality and skills make you welcome almost anywhere. Factions will try to co-opt your resources — do not let them. Most trusted figures across all faction lines.
[bold][color=#a4885c]Followers Scholar[/color][/bold] Record events, teach, collect pre-war documents and technical knowledge. The events of a single round may matter to generations. Archivists and educators whose records are genuinely valuable.
[bold][color=#4a6a99]Followers Aid Worker[/color][/bold] Assist in crises. Distribute food, water, and basic medical supplies. You are the organization's human face. First to arrive, last to leave.
## Faction Relations
[bold][color=#a4885c]Faction[/color][/bold]
[bold][color=#a4885c]Standing[/color][/bold]
[bold][color=#a4885c]Notes[/color][/bold]
NCR
[color=#6bba5e]Allies[/color]
Values Followers' medical expertise and public goodwill. Occasionally strained.
Brotherhood of Steel
[color=#cc3333]Hostile[/color]
Views free tech sharing as reckless and dangerous.
Caesar's Legion
[color=#cc3333]Hostile[/color]
Despises pacifism and egalitarianism. Captured Followers rarely survive.
Townsfolk
[color=#6bba5e]Friendly[/color]
Clinics and schools welcomed. Often the only organized medical presence.
Wastelanders
[color=#6bba5e]Friendly[/color]
Rely on Followers clinics for affordable treatment.
Wasteland Tribes
[color=#6bba5e]Friendly[/color]
Respect willingness to share knowledge without conditions.
Outlaws
[color=#ffb000]Cautious[/color]
Will treat anyone including raiders, but no illusions about the danger.
